data.name: tableLayoutPanel2.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="pnlRed" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlRedBlinking" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlYellow" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlYellowBlinking" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlGreen" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlGreenBlinking" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlBlue" Row="6" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlBlueBlinking" Row="7" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlNoneColor" Row="8" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,100" /><Rows Styles="Percent,11.11111,Percent,11.11111,Percent,11.11111,Percent,11.11111,Percent,11.11111,Percent,11.11111,Percent,11.11111,Percent,11.11111,Percent,11.11111" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tableLayoutPanel1.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="OfflineP" Row="9" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnLight_Offline" Row="9" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlOnlineRemote" Row="8" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnLight_OnlineRemote" Row="8" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlOnlineLocal" Row="7" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnLight_OnlineLocal" Row="7" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlProcessing" Row="6" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnLight_Process" Row="6" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlIdle" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnLight_Idle" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlOperator" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnLight_Operation" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlLURequest" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnLight_LUReq" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlMaintenance" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnLight_Maint" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="pnlErrorOccurring" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnLight_Err" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnTitle" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSelectColor" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnColor" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="tableLayoutPanel2" Row="1" RowSpan="9" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,33.33333,Percent,33.33333,Percent,33.33333" /><Rows Styles="Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Absolute,20" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: rtbInstruct.Text
data.value: The color of SignalTower when operating various is set. Select the content of the operation pushing, and push an optional color. Please end pushing "Save" button if all setting is good.
